goal: 修复FIX-054 CR的5个问题: ①integrity-check改用ls -t ②guard去冗余反斜杠 ③路径格式一致性说明 ④coordinator.md编号修复 ⑤步骤拆分

coverage_checklist.find_fixed: assert: integrity-check 用 ls -t 替代 -newer
coverage_checklist.backslash_removed: assert: guard.sh 移除 \\* 匹配
coverage_checklist.path_note: assert: schema description 注明相对路径推荐
coverage_checklist.steps_split: assert: post_task hooks 和 code review 拆为独立步骤
